ddls:
CREATE TABLE "universities" (
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each university */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the university */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the university */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the university is located */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the university was founded */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled */,
  "total_faculty" INTEGER /* Total number of faculty members */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the university */,
  "motto" TEXT /* University's motto or slogan */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the university's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university being ranked */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the ranking was published */,
  "world_rank" INTEGER /* World rank of the university */,
  "impact_rank" INTEGER /* Impact rank of the university */,
  "openness_rank" INTEGER /* Openness rank of the university */,
  "excellence_rank" INTEGER /* Excellence rank of the university */,
  "publishing_body" TEXT /* Organization or body that published the ranking */,
  "ranking_type" TEXT /* Type of ranking (e.g., global, regional, subject-specific) */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for the ranking */,
  "rank_change" INTEGER /* Change in rank from the previous year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the indicator */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the indicator */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight or importance of the indicator in the overall ranking */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_values" (
  "indicator_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator value */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator being measured */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university being measured */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the value was recorded */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the indicator for the university */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the indicator value */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the indicator value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_values_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_values_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, researcher, university representative) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Organization or university the user is affiliated with */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being granted permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view rankings, edit university profile) */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the permission */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access the permission grants (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, view rankings) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the platform */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the platform */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the user's session in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
